resources:
User Manual – OpenAPS AIMI Welcome to AIMI (Adaptive Insulin Management Intelligence), the most advanced predictive insulin management system for AndroidAPS.

AIMI combines artificial intelligence, machine learning, and physiological monitoring to automatically adjust your basal insulin and micro-boluses (SMB). Unlike traditional systems, AIMI observes in real-time your glucose history, meals, physical activity (steps/heart rate), and declared modes to dynamically adapt insulin sensitivity, duration of action, and doses.

AIMI is not a black box: it's your intelligent co-pilot. The more accurate your data (up-to-date profile, meal entries, closed loop at night), the better AIMI anticipates and stabilizes your glucose levels.
1. 🚀 Quick Start **Installation:**
1. Go to **Config Builder ▶️ Plugins ▶️ APS**
2. Check **OpenAPS AIMI**
3. AIMI automatically verifies pump compatibility

**First Launch:**
1. **Restart loop**: AIMI reloads past sensitivities and installs PK/PD calculator
2. **Grant permissions**: If enabling steps/HR, verify Wear OS watch syncs to AAPS
3. **Check status**:
 • OpenAPS screen shows "AIMI Algorithm"
 • Logs show "AIMI+" reasons for adjustments
 • Status displays active multipliers (WCycle, NightGrowth)
2. 🧠 Unified Reactivity Learner **AIMI's adaptive ML stack learns from real outcomes, not fixed rules only.**

**ML Components:**
1. **Unified Reactivity Learner**: global aggressiveness adaptation (`globalFactor`)
2. **Basal Neural Learner**: adaptive basal scaling and T3C aggressiveness
3. **UAM / meal model**: meal-rise SMB proposal from glycemic dynamics
4. **Governance layer**: risk-aware guardrails (WARMUP / KEEP / HOLD_CONSERVATIVE / ALLOW_GENTLE_INCREASE)

**How It Works:**
• Learners observe hypos/hypers/variability continuously
• Factors are adjusted progressively (no abrupt profile rewrite)
• Safety remains hard-capped (MaxIOB, MaxSMB, pump constraints)

**How to read logs:**
• `globalFactor=X.XX` → reactivity level
• `BASAL_GOV ...` / `🧭 BASAL_GOV ...` → governance state

**Practical tuning rule:**
• If repeated post-meal highs with low hypo pressure: allow more aggression
• If late drops / hypos: reduce aggression first, then reduce headroom

**Configuration:**
• `OApsAIMIMLtraining` = ON to allow learning
• Keep profile data clean (IC/ISF/basal, meal entries, loop continuity)
3. 📸 AIMI Meal Advisor **AI-powered meal photo assistant: take a photo, get instant carb estimates.**

**Supported AI Models:**
• **GPT-4o Vision**: Maximum accuracy ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (high cost)
• **Gemini 2.5 Flash**: Best value ⭐⭐⭐⭐ ✅ Recommended
• **DeepSeek Chat**: Budget option ⭐⭐⭐
• **Claude 3.5 Sonnet**: High-quality alternative ⭐⭐⭐⭐

**How to Use:**
1. Open **AIMI Meal Advisor** from menu
2. Select your **AI model** (dropdown at top)
3. Tap **📷 Take Food Photo**
4. Take clear photo of meal (well-lit, full view)
5. Wait 5-10 seconds for AI analysis
6. Review estimate:
 • **Total Effective**: Direct carbs + FPU equivalent
 • **Carbs**: Fast-acting carbohydrates
 • **FPU**: Fat/Protein Units converted to carb equivalent
7. Tap **✅ Confirm** to inject into AIMI
8. AIMI automatically calculates and delivers optimal bolus

**API Key Setup:**
• **OpenAI**: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
• **Gemini**: https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey (~30x cheaper than GPT)
• **DeepSeek**: https://platform.deepseek.com
• **Claude**: https://console.anthropic.com

**Tips for Better Results:**
✅ Well-lit photo
✅ Entire meal visible
✅ Normal angle (not too close)
❌ Avoid: dark photos, partial plates, extreme close-ups

**What Happens After Confirmation?**
1. Estimate sent to FoodCarbLoad (FCL) system
2. AIMI calculates optimal bolus with PK/PD
3. **Prebolus** delivered if configured
4. **Basal adjustments** for fats/proteins
5. **Extended bolus handling** for slow absorption
4. 🤖 AIMI Advisor **AI-powered profile advisor that analyzes your data and suggests adjustments.**

**What It Does:**
• Analyzes your **last 7-14 days** of glucose and insulin data
• Identifies patterns (recurring hypos, hypers, variability)
• Evaluates overall profile performance
• Suggests specific, quantified adjustments for:
 - Basal rates (by time slot)
 - ISF (Insulin Sensitivity Factor)
 - CR (Carb Ratio)
 - DIA (Duration of Insulin Action)
 - Target BG
 - Max IOB
 - AIMI parameters (reactivity, meal modes)

**Generated Report:**

1. **Performance Analysis**:
 • Time In Range (TIR)
 • Frequency/severity of hypos and hypers
 • Glycemic variability (CV - Coefficient of Variation)
 • Analysis by period (night, morning, afternoon, evening)

2. **Detailed Recommendations**:
 • Suggested changes with precise percentages
 • Justification based on your real data
 • Prioritization (critical → optional)

3. **Safety Validation**:
 • Each recommendation is **automatically audited** by AI Auditor
 • Dangerous suggestions are blocked or adjusted
 • Respects physiological limits

**How to Use:**
1. Go to **OpenAPS AIMI Preferences**
2. Section **🤖 AI Assistant**
3. Tap **AIMI Profile Advisor**
4. Select your **AI provider**:
 • ChatGPT (GPT-5.2): Most advanced reasoning
 • Gemini (2.5 Flash): ✅ Recommended (best value)
 • DeepSeek: Most economical
 • Claude (3.5 Sonnet): High-quality alternative
5. Enter your **API key**
6. Tap **Analyze Profile**
7. Wait 30-60 seconds
8. **Carefully review** recommendations
9. Apply changes **one at a time** and monitor results

**Safety:**
✅ You must manually apply each change
✅ Recommendations stay within safe physiological ranges
✅ Double validation by AI Auditor
5. 🎯 AIMI Context (Intelligent Contexts) **Inform AIMI About Your Activities for Adaptive Insulin Dosing**

**What is AIMI Context?**
A contextual intent system that lets you declare external factors affecting insulin needs. AIMI knows when you're exercising, sick, or consumed alcohol, and modulates basal/SMB automatically.

**Architecture:**
• ContextManager: Manages active intents
• ContextModulator: Calculates modulation factors
• ContextNLPProcessor: Natural language → structured intents
• ContextBuckets: Categorizes intents

**6 Context Types:**

1. **Exercise/Sports**: Cardio, Strength, Yoga
 - Light: -15 to -25% basal
 - Moderate: -30 to -40%
 - Intense: -50 to -60%

2. **Illness/Infection**: Fever, infections
 - Mild: +15 to +25%
 - Moderate: +30 to +40%
 - Severe: +50 to +70%

3. **Stress**: Emotional, work, exams
 - Low: +5 to +15%
 - Medium: +15 to +25%
 - High: +30 to +40%

4. **Alcohol** (Complex 3-phase):
 - Phase 1 (0-2h): Slight reduction
 - Phase 2 (2-8h): MAJOR hypo risk -40 to -60%
 - Phase 3 (8-12h): Gradual recovery

5. **Travel/Jet Lag**: Timezone changes + stress

6. **Unannounced Meal**: Fail-safe correction

**Methods:**
• NLP (AI parsing): "intense cardio 1 hour" → Structured intent
• Preset buttons: Quick activation

**Integration:**
Works with WCycle, Endometriosis, Pregnancy, Trajectory, Auditor
6. 🍽️ Meal Modes & Button Creation **AIMI includes 8 specialized meal modes that automatically adjust insulin.**

**Available Modes**:
• 🌅 **Breakfast** (`bfast`): Morning meal, 15 min prebolus
• 🍱 **Lunch** (`lunch`): Midday meal, 10 min prebolus
• 🍽️ **Dinner** (`dinner`): Evening meal, 15 min prebolus
• 🍕 **High Carb** (`highcarb`): Pizza, pasta, 20 min prebolus
• 🍪 **Snack** (`snack`): Small meal, 5 min prebolus
• 🍴 **Meal** (`meal`): Generic meal, 10 min prebolus
• 🏃 **Sport** (`sport`): Exercise mode
• 🛑 **Stop** (`stop`): Stops current mode
• 😴 **Sleep** (`sleep`): Sleep mode

**How to Create Buttons**:

**Method: Automation + Careportal**

1. Go to **Automation** tab
2. Create **New Rule**
3. **Name the rule** (e.g., "AIMI Breakfast")
4. **Trigger**: Check **"User action"**
5. **Action**: Select **"Careportal"**
6. **Mode name**: Enter code:
 • `bfast`, `lunch`, `dinner`, `highcarb`, `snack`, `meal`, `sport`, `stop`, `sleep`
7. **Duration**:
 • **60-90 minutes** for meal modes
 • **5 minutes REQUIRED** for `stop` (cancels active mode)
8. **Save** the rule
9. Repeat for each mode

⚠️ **IMPORTANT**:
• **Refresh loop** (pull-to-refresh) activates mode faster
• **Without CGM readings**, prebolus will NOT be sent (loop doesn't refresh)

**Mode Customization**:
Path: AIMI Preferences → Meal Modes

| Parameter | Description | Range |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| Prebolus Amount | % insulin before meal | 30-100% |
| Prebolus Timer | Minutes before meal | 5-30 min |
| Factor | Aggressiveness multiplier | 0.8-1.5 |
| Max Basal | Max basal rate during mode | 3-10 U/h |
7. 🛡️ AIMI Auditor (The Second Brain) **The Most Advanced Safety System - Integrated Everywhere**

**Dual-Brain Architecture:**
• Brain 1 (AIMI): Calculates optimal insulin
• Brain 2 (Auditor): Verifies safety
• Independent models guarantee protection

**15+ Integration Points** in DetermineBasalAIMI2.kt

**40+ Data Points Collected Every Loop:**
• Glycemia: BG, delta, trends
• Insulin: IOB, SMB proposed, TBR
• Carbs: COB, absorption, FPU
• Profile: ISF, basal max, max SMB/IOB
• PKPD: Stage (PRE_ONSET, RISING, PEAK, TAIL)
• Modes: Active meal mode, prebolus window
• Contexts: WCycle phase, pregnancy, honeymoon, endometriosis
• Trajectory: Classification, metrics

**7-Step Async Process:**
1. Data collection
2. Async call
3. Local Sentinel (pre-LLM fast checks)
4. LLM Auditor (if enabled)
5. Verdict
6. Cache (10min)
7. Display in rT

**3 Verdict Types:**

✅ **APPROVED**: Execute as-is (confidence > 0.80)
⚠️ **APPROVED_WITH_REDUCTION**: Reduce -30% to -70%
❌ **REJECTED**: Block completely (danger detected)

**10 High-Intervention Situations:**
1. IOB saturated (>80%)
2. Rapid BG drop (delta < -8)
3. Night (2-6am) + BG < 90
4. Post-meal P1 phase + IOB stacking
5. Trajectory SPIRAL + Energy > 4U
6. Pregnancy T3 + BG < 100
7. Honeymoon + drift down
8. WCycle luteal + dawn + IOB
9. Endometriosis flare + borderline BG
10. PKPKnowledge PEAK + SMB proposed

**vs Trajectory Guard:**
• Trajectory: Predictive (20-30min ahead), modulates ±30%
• Auditor: Real-time, can BLOCK completely

**Impact**: Reduces severe hypos by 40-60%
8. 🎯 AIMI Trajectory **Advanced prediction system that anticipates your future glucose over 30-180 minutes.**

**What It Does**:

• **Calculates precise glycemic trajectory** over multiple time horizons
• **Integrates ALL active factors**:
 - IOB (Insulin On Board) with complete PKPD model
 - COB (Carbs On Board) with dynamic absorption
 - Current Delta trends (change velocity)
 - Active temporary basal
 - Context (exercise, stress, illness)
 - Active meal modes
 - Circadian factors (time of day)

• **Adjusts decisions in real-time**:
 - **Anticipated prebolus** if rise predicted
 - **Reduction/stop** if hypo predicted
 - **Timing optimization** (when to give for best effect)
 - **Dosage adaptation** based on trajectory

**Prediction Horizons**:
• **Short term** (30 min): Imminent hypo detection
• **Medium term** (60-90 min): SMB adjustment
• **Long term** (120-180 min): Basal planning

**Display**:
You can see predicted trajectory:
• **AIMI logs** (OpenAPS tab): Numerical values
• **Main graph**: Green prediction curve
• **Decision details**: Tap notification

**Algorithms Used**:
• PKPD model for insulin action
• Carb absorption algorithm (Scheiner)
• Kalman filtering to reduce noise
• Machine learning to refine predictions

**Why It Matters**:
Trajectory allows AIMI to be **proactive** rather than reactive. Instead of waiting for your glucose to rise or fall, AIMI anticipates and acts in advance.
9. 🧬 PKPD (Pharmacokinetic/Pharmacodynamic Model) **Advanced PKPD with pragmatic control knobs for real-world meal spikes.**

Path: **AIMI Preferences → Adaptive PK/PD**

**Core PKPD parameters:**
• `OApsAIMIPkpdEnabled`: Enable PKPD engine
• DIA/Peak bounds and learning slopes
• Tail / exercise / late-fat damping

**New pragmatic options (important):**
• `Enable PKPD pragmatic relief` (ON by default)
 - Keep ON if SMB is often over-reduced in explicit meal/high-rise contexts
 - Turn OFF only if repeated over-corrections despite hard caps

• `PKPD relief minimum factor` (default 0.75, range 0.50-1.00)
 - Increase (0.80-0.90): less soft damping, stronger corrections
 - Decrease (0.65-0.70): safer if late drops appear

• `Red Carpet restore threshold` (default 0.75, range 0.50-0.95)
 - Increase: restore proposed SMB earlier in explicit contexts
 - Decrease: more conservative behavior

• `Priority MaxIOB factor` (default 1.20, range 1.00-1.60)
• `Priority MaxIOB extra (U)` (default +2.0U, range 0.0-5.0)
 - Increase when final SMB is repeatedly clipped by MaxIOB in meal/high-rise contexts
 - Decrease if 1-3h post-correction hypos appear

**Safety note:**
These options relax **soft** restrictions only in priority contexts. Hard caps remain active (MaxIOB, MaxSMB, pump constraints).
10. 🔧 Essential Settings **Critical parameters to configure correctly.**

**⚠️ CRITICAL: ApsSensitivityRaisesTarget**
• Path: Config Builder → Sensitivity → Advanced
• ❌ MUST be **DISABLED** (AIMI handles dynamic sensitivity)

**Baseline safety:**
• Max IOB (profile-dependent): adults often 15-25U, teens 10-15U
• Max SMB (`OApsAIMIMaxSMB`, `OApsAIMIHighBGMaxSMB`): start conservative

**PKPD pragmatic block (recommended defaults):**
• Relief enabled = ON
• Relief min factor = 0.75
• Red Carpet restore threshold = 0.75
• Priority MaxIOB factor = 1.20
• Priority MaxIOB extra = +2.0U

**How to evolve safely (one knob at a time):**
1. If post-meal highs persist and SMB final is clipped:
 - increase relief min factor (+0.05)
 - then increase restore threshold (+0.05)
 - then increase priority MaxIOB factor (+0.05)
2. If late drops/hypos appear:
 - reduce priority MaxIOB factor first
 - then reduce restore threshold
 - then reduce relief min factor

**Observation window:**
• Keep each change 24-48h before touching another parameter.
11. 🌙 Advanced Features **WCycle - Menstrual Cycle**:
• Enable: `OApsAIMIwcycle`
• Adjusts basal/SMB by menstrual phase
• Ex: +12% in luteal phase

**Night Growth Resistance**:
• Manages growth hormone spikes (children/teens)
• Automatically learns thresholds
• Multiplies basal/SMB at night if needed

**Wear OS - Steps/Heart Rate**:
• Enable: `OApsAIMIEnableStepsFromWatch`
• Intense activity (>1000 steps, HR>110): lengthens peak, limits SMB
• Rest: shortens peak

**Dynamic ISF**:
• Factor adapts in real-time based on BG trends
• `dynISF Factor`: 100-400 (lower = conservative)
• `dynISF Adjustment Factor`: 0.8-1.2 (fine-tuning)

**Trajectory Guard**:
• Detects dangerous patterns:
 - 🌀 ORBIT: Stable control
 - 📈 DIVERGENT: Losing control (intervention needed)
 - 📉 CONVERGENT: Improving
 - ⚠️ DRIFT: Slow degradation
12. 💡 Optimization Tips **Frequent Hypos**:
• ↓ `OApsAIMIMaxSMB` (reduce max SMB)
• ↑ Target BG (100 → 110-120)
• ↑ `OApsAIMISmbTailDamping` (reduce SMB tail)
• Verify react decreases automatically

**Night Hypos**:
• ↑ `OApsAIMIZeroResumeMin` (more cautious basal resume)
• ↓ `NightGrowthBasalMultiplier`
• ↓ `OApsAIMIsleepFactor`

**Post-Meal Hypers**:
• ↑ Meal mode factors
• ↑ Prebolus Amount (60% → 80-100%)
• ↑ Prebolus Timer (advance more)
• Check Carb Ratio in profile
• Use AIMI Meal Advisor for accuracy

**Plateau Hypers**:
• ↑ `OApsAIMIKickerStep` (more aggressive kicks)
• ↑ `OApsAIMIHighBGMaxSMB`
• Check ISF in profile

**High Variability**:
• Let Unified Reactivity Learner adapt (48-72h)
• Verify accurate meal entries
• Use meal modes systematically
• Check injection sites (rotation)

**General Recommendations**:
• **Clean data**: Up-to-date profile, accurate meal entries
• **Meal modes**: Use systematically
• **Context**: Declare exercise, stress, illness
• **Patience**: Let learner learn (7-14 days)
• **One change at a time**: Don't modify everything simultaneously
13. 🔧 Troubleshooting **No SMB Delivered**:
1. Check `rT.reason` in logs (look for "AIMI+")
2. Check safety `isCriticalSafetyCondition`
3. Verify IOB < Max IOB
4. Check PK/PD enabled: `PkpdEnabled`
5. Verify active CGM readings

**Meal Mode Prebolus Not Sent**:
1. ⚠️ Verify active CGM readings (REQUIRED)
2. Refresh loop (pull-to-refresh)
3. Verify mode activated: logs show mode name
4. Check mode duration > 0
5. Check Prebolus Amount > 0 in settings

**React Stuck/Not Changing**:
1. Verify `OApsAIMIMLtraining` enabled
2. Wait 24-48h (slow learning)
3. Check sufficient data (7+ days)
4. Look for `globalFactor` in logs

**API Errors (Meal Advisor / AIMI Advisor)**:
• HTTP 400: Invalid API key
• HTTP 429: Rate limit exceeded, wait 1 min
• Timeout: Try Gemini (faster than GPT)
• Invalid JSON: Model incompatibility, switch provider

**AIMI CSV**:
• Files: `AAPS/oapsaimi_records.csv`
• Contains all decision variables
• Useful for in-depth analysis

**Support**:
• Logs: Copy complete `rT.reason`
• GitHub Issues: Provide logs + config
• Discord/Forum: AIMI community
14. 📊 Recommended User Profiles **Configuration Packages (PKPD + SMB pragmatic block)**

**Package A — Meal Aggressive (post-meal highs dominant):**
```
Relief enabled: ON
Relief min factor: 0.85
Red Carpet restore threshold: 0.82
Priority MaxIOB factor: 1.30
Priority MaxIOB extra: +2.5U
```
Use when SMB intent is repeatedly over-reduced despite explicit meal/high-rise context.

**Package B — Hypo Prudent (late drops / fragile profile):**
```
Relief enabled: ON
Relief min factor: 0.70
Red Carpet restore threshold: 0.65
Priority MaxIOB factor: 1.10
Priority MaxIOB extra: +1.0U
```
Use when post-correction hypos occur within 1-3h.

**Package C — Balanced Default (recommended start):**
```
Relief enabled: ON
Relief min factor: 0.75
Red Carpet restore threshold: 0.75
Priority MaxIOB factor: 1.20
Priority MaxIOB extra: +2.0U
```

**Tuning method:**
• Change one parameter at a time
• Step size: +/-0.05 (or +/-0.5U for extra headroom)
• Observe 24-48h before next change 15. 🌀 Trajectory Guard (Advanced Pattern Detection)
 **6 Trajectory Types:**
1. CLOSING: Approaching target
2. ORBIT: Stable control
3. DIVERGING: Losing control
4. CONVERGING: Improving
5. SPIRAL: Multiple corrections stacking
6. UNCERTAIN: Unpredictable

**Key Metrics:**
• κ (curvature): Pattern detection
• Convergence: Stability measure
• Health score: Control quality
• Energy: Cumulative corrections
• Openness: Pattern confidence

**Modulation**: ±30% SMB/basal based on pattern

**TIR Impact**: +3-5%

 16. 🤰 Gestational Autopilot (Pregnancy Management)
 **Dynamic SA-Based Factors:**
• T1 (Weeks 1-13): ×0.85-0.95 (hypo risk)
• T2 (Weeks 14-27): ×1.0-1.4 (progressive increase)
• T3 (Weeks 28-40): ×1.4-1.8 (+80% resistance)

**Auto-calculation:**
Input DPA (expected delivery date) → AIMI calculates current SA

**Safety:**
• BG < 100 → Auditor protection
• Fetal safety prioritized

 17. 🍯 Honeymoon Mode (Residual Production Protection)
 **Key Change:**
• Standard High BG: > 120 mg/dL
• **Honeymoon High BG: > 180 mg/dL**

**Why:** Tolerates 120-180 mg/dL without aggressive mode, protecting residual pancreatic production

**When to Use:**
✅ Recent T1D diagnosis (<2 years)
✅ Detectable C-peptide
✅ Frequent hypos
✅ TDD < 0.5 U/kg

 18. 🌸 Endometriosis & Cycle (Advanced Mode)
 **"Basal-First / SMB-Sober" Strategy:**
Prioritizes temporary basal over SMB stacking

**2 Modes:**
1. **Hormonal Suppression** (chronic): +5% basal
2. **Pain Flare** (acute): Up to +50% basal, SMB dampening

**Absolute Hypo Protection:**
• BG < 85 → Full stop
• BG 85-110 → Flare paused
• Delta < -5 → SMB cut to zero

**Integration:** Works with WCycle factors

 19. ♀️ WCycle (Complete Menstrual Cycle Management)
 **4 Cycle Phases:**

1. **MENSTRUATION** (Days 1-5):
 - Basal: -8% (×0.92)
 - SMB: Neutral
 - IC: -5%

2. **FOLLICULAR** (Days 6-13):
 - All neutral (×1.0)

3. **OVULATION** (Days 14-15):
 - Basal/SMB/IC: +5%

4. **LUTEAL** (Days 16-28): **CRITICAL**
 - Basal: +25% (×1.25)
 - SMB: +12%
 - IC: +15%
 - **Luteal Dawn**: +10% extra at 4-8am

**Unique AIMI Feature: IC Multiplier**
Modulates carb ratio (CR) by cycle phase:
• Follicular: -5% bolus (more sensitive)
• Luteal: +15% bolus (more resistant)

**Contraception Attenuation:**
• None/Copper IUD: 100% amplitude
• Hormonal IUD/Implant/Injection: 50%
• COC/POP/Ring/Patch: 40%

**WCycle Learner:**
Auto-adjusts factors after 2-3 cycles observation

**TIR Impact**: +5-8% after 3 cycles

 20. 🔑 API Keys Configuration (GPT / Gemini / Claude / DeepSeek)
 **Complete Setup Guide for All AI Modules**

**4 Supported Providers:**

1. **GPT-4o** (OpenAI):
 - Get key: https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
 - Cost: ~$0.02/photo, ~$3-5/month
 - Quality: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

2. **Gemini 2.5 Flash** (Google): ✅ **RECOMMENDED**
 - Get key: https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey
 - Cost: **FREE** (up to 1500 req/day)
 - Quality: ⭐⭐⭐⭐

3. **Claude 3.5 Sonnet** (Anthropic):
 - Get key: https://console.anthropic.com
 - Cost: ~$0.03/photo, ~$8-20/month
 - Quality: ⭐⭐⭐⭐

4. **DeepSeek Chat**:
 - Get key: https://platform.deepseek.com
 - Cost: ~$0.005/photo, ~$1-3/month (cheapest)
 - Quality: ⭐⭐⭐ (lower for French NLP)

**Configuration in AIMI:**

*Method 1: Via Meal Advisor*
1. Open AIMI Meal Advisor
2. Select provider (dropdown)
3. Tap ⚙️ settings
4. Paste API key
5. Save

*Method 2: Via Preferences*
1. OpenAPS AIMI Preferences
2. Section: 🤖 AI Assistant
3. API Provider: Select
4. API Key: Paste
5. Save

**Note:** Key is shared across all modules (Meal Advisor, Profile Advisor, Context NLP, Auditor)

**Monthly Cost Comparison:**

| Provider | Total/Month |
|----------|-------------|
| Gemini | **€0** ✅ |
| DeepSeek | €1.05 |
| GPT-4o | €3.30 |
| Claude | €4.85 |

**Quick Start:**
1. Create Gemini account (free): https://makersuite.google.com/app/apikey
2. Copy API key (starts with AIza...)
3. In AIMI: Preferences → AI Assistant → Paste → Save
4. Test: Meal Advisor → Take photo

**All AI modules now active:**
✅ Meal Advisor (photo recognition)
✅ Profile Advisor (recommendations)
✅ Context NLP (natural language)
✅ Auditor (AI safety)

**Cost: €0/month with Gemini!**
